description: The NEMO ocean model code forms the basis of the UK Global Versions 6 and 7 of the UK Global Ocean configuration (known as GO6 and GO7), which form the ocean components of the Met Office GC3.1 coupled model and UKESM1 Earth System Model, as used in CMIP6.  GO6 is a traceable hierarchy of three model configurations at nominal 1, 1∕4 and  resolutions, while GO7 is identical to GO6 except that the cavities under the ice shelves are opened.  UKESM1.3 uses version 3.6 of the NEMO code.
